name: iFLYTEK Co.,Ltd
summary: Iflytek Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development of artificial intelligence (AI) technologies. The company develops and offers software and chip products. It also provides machine translation systems; intelligent speech, medical image, and cognitive intelligence based auxiliary medical systems; and smart voice court hearing systems for politics and laws. In addition, the company offers smart education products for teaching students; AI voice assistants, vehicle-mounted AI systems, and all-in-one infotainment systems for smart automobiles; and call center solutions for channeling voice self-services. Iflytek Co., Ltd. was founded in 1999 and is based in Hefei, China.
